programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: S4E3 - Michael and Ashley create a charming, cozy bungalow with a coastal style by adding a hanging bed, a nautical-themed 8-foot custom dining table, and handcrafted concrete countertops. (Home improvement, How-to)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S4E6 - NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: S5E6 - Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: S1E1 - In a quick transformation with no demo required, Joanna creates the feel of an indoor garden in a home's living room, dining room and breakfast nook. (Home improvement)

programme.title: Planterior With Hilton Carter
programme.desc: S1E1 - Hilton Carter brings the tropics to a 200-year-old historic home called "The Bible House" in the heart of Baltimore; he takes on the living room, bathroom, outdoor patio and the largest living plant wall he has ever created. (Home improvement)

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S1E7 - In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. (House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S2E11 - A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa; they find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected. (House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S2E6 - An Atlanta couple fight budget restraints as they seek the perfect vacation home for their blended family in Jackson Lake, Ga. (House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S4E7 - A couple looking for a forever home for their family of four find a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County in Washington; to save money, they plan to tackle most of the renovations themselves. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: S2E8 - After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, Fla. (Reality, House/garden, Home improvement)

programme.title: Raging Bull
programme.desc: RAGING BULL is director Martin Scorsese's lacerating film biography of middleweight boxing champion Jake LaMotta, who was known during his brief reign as "the Bronx Bull."

programme.title: Atlantic City
programme.desc: For Lou, 40 years a bodyguard-boyfriend to aging beauty queen Grace, his numbers-running sideline escalates to mob involvement. A drug-related slaying leaves him with a small fortune.

programme.title: Adaptation
programme.desc: Director Spike Jonze delivers a stunningly original comedy that seamlessly blends fictional characters and situations with the lives of real people. As Charlie struggles to adapt Orlean's best-selling book "The Orchid Thief", he writes himself into it.

programme.title: Babel
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a married couple on vacation in the Moroccan desert, touching off an interlocking story involving four different families.

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals while he is hired by a beautiful socialite to investigate her husband's extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Identity
programme.desc: What if every choice we ever make was already made for us? What if there really were no coincidences in life and our destinies were already predetermined? Ten strangers with secrets are brought together in a savage rainstorm. Rated: R

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: During an historic counter-terrorism summit in Spain, the President of the United States is struck down by an assassin's bullet. Eight strangers have a perfect view of the kill, but what did they really see? Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals while he is hired by a beautiful socialite to investigate her husband's extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Hailed as a landmark film that dazzles with deep emotion and exceptional acting, PHILADELPHIA stars Tom Hanks and Denzel Washington as two competing lawyers who join forces to sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Action-adventure superstar Arnold Schwarzenegger bursts through the screen as a larger-than-life movie hero in this nonstop adventure from acclaimed director John McTiernan (Predator, Die Hard). Rating: PG-13

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A wrongly-convicted man must try to survive a public execution gauntlet staged as a TV game show.

programme.title: Raw Deal
programme.desc: Dismissed some time ago from the FBI, Mark Kaminsky is contacted by his old boss, Shannon, whose son has been murdered. Shannon needs Kaminsky's help and offers to re-instate him if he is successful.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: A paroled man picks up the wrong rental vehicle and quickly realizes that he is the target of an entire police force. The cops will do anything to stop the corruption testimony of a woman he discovered tied-up in the vehicle's trunk.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team build an apartment so that Frank and Christine can care for their son at home. He had an accident that resulted in severe brain damage and paralysis, leaving him unable to walk, talk, or feed himself, and requiring 24-hour care.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team makes a home as comfortable as possible for the Liversidge family, who have been affected by Fabry's disease. To make things worse, Jason was also diagnosed with motor neuron disease, giving him just years to live.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Identical twins Katie and Emelia were born with achondroplasia, and their father, Mark, is recovering from aggressive bowel and liver cancer. The family struggles for space, so the team is on hand to help build them a home for a better future.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team are in Stoke-on-Trent to create an openplan kitchen-diner for the Harris family.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: A close friend nominates Sam and Ben for Nick, the boys, and designer Oliver Heath to transform their house from the prison it has become into a stunning home that could offer five-year-old Ewan the best hope for the future.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry help turn run-down properties into homes for two former soldiers who fought in Iraq and Afghanistan and are suffering from post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD).

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team attempt to regenerate a rundown community in Manchester, aiming to transform an entire street of empty properties into homes for war veterans and building a support center to help other veterans find homes and jobs.

programme.title: How to Be a Gardener
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh tackles a family garden with his own horticultural starter kit - ten plants no garden should be without. And how to lay a patio guaranteed not to wobble.

programme.title: How to Be a Gardener
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh shows how to create a cottage garden, from scratch, explaining which plants to choose and why they are easy plants to grow.

programme.title: How to Be a Gardener
programme.desc: What do the words water feature conjure for you? Gorgeous tinkling fountains or a stagnant green mess? Alan Titchmarsh dons his waders to create the perfect natural pond and his aqualung to rescue a fetid feature to it's former glory.

programme.title: How to Be a Gardener
programme.desc: This week Alan opens his bag of design tricks to make a small space look bigger, longer and infinitely more inviting while proving that plants really can be dramatic if you know how to arrange them.

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Glasgow couple Christine Arthur and Chris Collins to furnish their first time buy - a lovely but beige tenement flat.

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp takes on a challenge when she sets out to help Samantha Peterson from Eastbourne, who wants to inject some personality into her flat.

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Home: Retro Wedding
programme.desc: With some clever crafts, retro flower arrangements, and a bit of homemade magic, Kirstie and the team create a military-themed, vintage-inspired wedding for Amy and Craig.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Gardens
programme.desc: In America, Monty meets garden guerrillas in New York, visits a Virginian garden that reflects the birth of the nation, and visits Hollywood gardens.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Gardens
programme.desc: After enjoying Burle Marx's private garden in Rio de Janeiro, Monty travels by boat to see the ingenious floating gardens of the Amazon.

programme.title: Phil Spencer - Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil travels to Tunstall in Kent, to the country cottage of Sarah Sewells and Andrew Morris.

programme.title: Phil Spencer - Secret Agent
programme.desc: In Stamford, Phil tries to help Mark and Tina sell their detached three-bed house as they bid to downsize.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team are in Surrey to help two long-distance lovers by turning a river barge into a familly-friendly love boat.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team are in Willenhall near Wolverhampton to help a family complete work on a garage conversion.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team transforms the home of Richard and Jude Ford and their three children.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Chris Beardshaw's award-winning garden is transported from the Chelsea Flower Show to Great Ormond Street Hospital to offer the perfect escape.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team helps a lady who suffers from brain damage, speech loss, and paralysis after a stroke following the birth of her twin boys. Her cramped, cluttered rooms are unsafe and hampering her recovery.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team demolish a cramped bungalow and build an entirely new bespoke five-bedroom home for an inspirational family with complex special needs.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team build Sascha a home-dialysis room, which offers her a lifeline and extra years with her loving family.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team and hundreds of volunteers to help 12-year-old Matthew return home from the hospital for the first time in three years, after suffering cancer and a stroke.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Home renovation programme. The team helps David Robinson, discharged from the army for medical reasons after being injured in Iraq, sort out his DIY issues.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team and volunteers help transform the home of 24-year-old Ryan, who suffered a blockage that caused brain damage. His house accommodations with all the care provisions he needs. If the family doesn't get this work done, Ryan will remain in hospital.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team is back on Veteran street to build the final home on the road for an amputee, single dad Simon Flores, and his young family.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Back In The Hunt
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, head for open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Fish!
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for the elusive and lucrative giant Bluefin tuna, with harpooners going up against rod-and-reelers. (Series, Reality)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Numbers War
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester battle for prime fishing spots in their quest to catch the elusive and lucrative Bluefin Tuna. (Series, Reality)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin. (Series, Reality)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off? (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Hoax or History: The Michigan Relics
programme.desc: Archeological fraud in North America.

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Royal Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Considering the case of a Nazi ally's murder as an assassination in disguise.

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Spycraft

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: A look at the armored units who landed in Normandy to spearhead the Allied advance into Nazi occupied Europe and break open the Third Reich's defenses in the face of minefields and camouflaged anti-tank guns.

programme.title: A Terrible Beauty: The Irish Rebellion Of 1916
programme.desc: Over six days, Dublin is gripped by an uprising that tears the city apart and left causalities on both sides.

programme.title: A Terrible Beauty: The Irish Rebellion Of 1916

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The U.S. Army's 101st Airborne Division, the Screaming Eagles, parachuted into their first battle on D-Day, June 6, 1944, proving its worth as one of the most accomplished and toughest combat formations ever fielded by the U.S. Army.

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The U.S. Army Rangers were specially selected and trained with the help of British commandos; a select few joined their British counterparts in the ill-fated Dieppe Raid of 1942. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Battle Honours
programme.desc: The 8th United States Army Air Force flew some of World War II's most daring raids over Germany and mainland Europe. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: During the four decades of the Cold War, two global superpowers face off, poised for swift and terrible action, threatening to annihilate one another, with the push of a button. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further into chaos and closer to the edge of WWIII. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: Russia seals itself behind an Iron Curtain, spawning the birth of revolutions across East Europe as the bitter rivalry between capitalism and communism rages from Berlin to Havana and all the way to Outer Space. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: The stakes couldn't be higher in the 60's as the USSR places nuclear warheads in Cuba, the first US troops arrive in Vietnam, the world witnesses the moon landing. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: The Ghosts of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Descendants of Nazi supporters and officers share their poignant and agonizing stories of guilt, shame and pain that continue to shadow their lives. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Tony Robinson's History of Britain
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes back to the Second World War. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Featuring the stories and events that have shaped humanity, HistoryTime offers viewers a deep understanding of how we got here and why things are the way they are. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: Joseph Stalin is long gone by the 1970s, but Russia's determination to win the nuclear arms race strengthens; advances in nuclear technology pours fuel on the fire in the international arms race. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: By the end of the 70s, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive this so-called Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: In the early 1980s the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy, emerges in the United States' own backyard. The Cold War is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: M.A.D. World
programme.desc: In 1989, the USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: In the UK's first flight to the modern-day jet engine, Jules Hudson discovers Farnborough's incredible contribution to air science and research. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: Jules Hudson discovers the hidden stories of the airfields that saved Britain and her wartime Allies, starting with the crucial contribution made by Biggin Hill. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Defenders of the Sky
programme.desc: Jules Hudson visits Duxford, home of Douglas Bader's Big Wing in the Battle of Britain and an aerodrome welcoming thousands of GIs in WWII. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: Secrets of the Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: High up in the Austrian Alps lies the mysterious Lake Toplitz that has obsessed treasure hunters. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: The Spy Who Stole the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Explores the remarkable story of the woman who stole vital secrets about the atomic bomb from the British, and then passed them on to the Soviet Union. (Documentary, Series)

programme.title: iCarly

programme.desc: Forest fires threaten Rust Valley and after his neighbour loses 350 cars, Mike hoards fuel in case he needs to save his own collection. Cassidy leads the charge on a unique project for charity, and James takes on an impossible job. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: New painter Neil takes a perfectionist approach to re-painting Connor’s ’66 Chevelle Malibu, Mike worries that his car collection won’t sell for much at auction, and Dubs Kustoms scores a new client with an impossible dream. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike struggles to pick just ten cars to keep out of his massive collection, and helps build an ultra-rare Volkswagen truck. Shafin convinces Avery to clean up his yard with the help of a monster truck. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike builds a big wagon for a big family – a 1964 Parisienne – just as last-minute chaos in the final days of auction preparation throw the event into jeopardy. Avery scores his first client of the year, building a 1975 Ford Bronco. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: A major setback in the final stages of restoring a 1964 Parisienne blows Mike’s budget. The day of Mike’s auction – and the biggest financial gamble of his life – arrives. Mike grapples with regret and chaos threatens to derail the entire event. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Engine failure en route to Portugal forces one Turkey crew to negotiate a treacherous return to Santa Maria. Mikey and Scott search for a new rampie. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. En route to Turkey, Arnie and Justin face some serious volcanoes and massive Mediterranean air traffic. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and risky flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey. And in Yellowknife, Wilf’s first run as flight attendant causes consternation. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Kelly confronts husband Juan and comes to a decision about her future at Buffalo. Jeremy makes a mistake that could end his career, and fate throws Scott an unexpected curve ball. (Reality, Series)

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: Texan arrives with his hunting gear – and a trailer full of unusual trophies. Suitcases of undeclared food may cost three Chinese students a lot more than they’re worth. (Reality, Family Viewing, Series)

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: The Inland Enforcement Unit tracks a pair of Honduran drug runners illegally in the country. An American tourist seems to have already put down roots in Canada. (Reality, Family Viewing, Series)

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A distinctive bag has officers seeing double. A photographer misses the big picture. Three strikes and an American trio may be out. Red threads make for red flags in the mail centre. (Reality, Family Viewing, Series)

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A traveller’s belongings raise repeated alarms. An intercepted heat lamp may be keeping narcotics warm. Officers suspect a traveller may be hiding a handgun. A man’s reasons for studying in Canada may not be academic. (Reality, Family Viewing, Series)

programme.title: Border Security
programme.desc: A young man's lies could keep him from his fiancée. A gold bar and a pile of cash put a traveller on the watch list. A US visitor is shocked to learn about his unusual criminal record. (Reality, Family Viewing, Series)

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The Pickers head down East, testing their luck around New Brunswick. While perplexed by Scott’s hunt for broken toys, Sheldon is cured of his ills in a vintage pharmacy by a rare, ahem, suppository maker. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: The Pickers find vintage hockey seats signed by Guy Lafleur and are swamped when uninvited sellers create a four-way buying free-for-all at an old Quebec bar. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Scott and Sheldon search for pickers gold in the Yukon. They meet a bunch of characters in Whitehorse, Tagish, and Dawson, and unearth a hand carved bear statue, prehistoric bison skulls, and a woolly mammoth tusk. (Home & Lifestyle, Series)

programme.title: Made in America
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Jay-Z organizes the "Budweiser Made In America" music festival.

programme.title: Boris Karloff: The Man Behind The Monster
programme.desc: Karloff, examining his illustrious 60-year career in the entertainment industry and his enduring legacy as one of the icons of 20th century popular culture.

programme.title: Fata Morgana
programme.desc: Footage shot in and around the Sahara Desert, accompanied only by a spoken creation myth and the songs of Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: Festival Express
programme.desc: In the summer of 1970, several of the era's biggest rock stars took to the rails for Festival Express. The show was a multi-artist, multi-city concert tour that captured the spirit and imagination of a generation.

programme.title: Herdsmen Of The Sun
programme.desc: Herzog's documentary of the Wodaabe people of the Sahara/Sahel region. Particular attention is given to the tribe's spectacular courtship rituals and 'beauty pageants'.

programme.title: Huie's Sermon
programme.desc: The reverend Huie L. Rogers delivers an intense and impassioned sermon at his church in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Little Dieter Needs To Fly
programme.desc: In 1966, Dieter Dengler was shot down over Laos, captured, and, down to 85 pounds, escaped. Barefoot, surviving monsoons, leeches, and machete-wielding villagers, he was rescued. Now, near 60, living on Mt. Tamalpais, Dengler tells his story.

programme.title: My Best Fiend
programme.desc: In the 1950s, a teenage Werner Herzog was transfixed by a film performance of the young Klaus Kinski. Years later, they would share an apartment where, in an unabated, 48 hour fit of rage, Kinski completely destroyed the bathroom. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Something From Nothing: The Art Of Rap
programme.desc: Ice-T travels coast to coast interviewing rap performers such as Q-Tip, Common and Kanye West to pay tribute to the musical art form. (Documentary, Music Documentaries, Movie)

programme.title: The Beatles Explosion
programme.desc: See the early days of the Beatles with rare interviews, newsreels, press conferences, and television appearances. (Documentary, Music Documentaries, Movie)

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization
programme.desc: Penelope Spheeris' The Decline Of Western Civilization is a riveting, unflinching and hard-core film which adeptly captures the spirit of a major cultural phenomenon. (Documentary, Music Documentaries, Movie)

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization, Part II: The Metal Years
programme.desc: The second in Penelope Spheeris’ trilogy, The Metal Years takes a fast-paced look at the outrageous Heavy Metal scene of the late '80s. (Documentary, Music Documentaries, Movie)

programme.title: The Great Ecstasy Of Woodcarver Steiner
programme.desc: A study of the psychology of a champion ski-jumper, whose full-time occupation is carpentry. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Alambic: Modern Alchemy
programme.desc: Modern Alchemy depicts a quest for self-knowledge that revolves around resilience, reconstruction and rebirth. A succession of colours, each more vibrant than the last, in which one stops breathing for a moment to find a path toward inner peace. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Charley Squash Goes to Town
programme.desc: This satirical short was the first animated film by an Indigenous director to be produced at the NFB. The film pokes gentle fun at Indigenous stereotypes and challenges the idea that Indigenous youth should seek to blend in to mainstream society. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Highrise - Universe Within - New York City - Hurricane
programme.desc: In the absence of timely government emergency response to the devastation of Hurricane Sandy, one woman turns to google docs to organize the relief efforts of volunteers going door-to-door, floor-by-floor in the highrises of south Brooklyn. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Deep in Vogue
programme.desc: "Deep in Vogue" celebrates the colorful, queer, emotional and political stories of Northern vogue and its people. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Becoming Queen
programme.desc: Led by the incomparable voice and showmanship of Freddie Mercury, Queen pioneered a unique brand of operatic Documentary that perfectly encapsulated the decadent excess of the 1970s. This documentary traces the history of the band. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: Forty years after the death of Elvis Presley, a musical road trip across America in his 1963 Rolls Royce explores how a country boy lost his authenticity and became a king while his country lost her democracy and became an empire. (Movie, Foreign Action & Adventure, Action)

programme.title: Home Feeling: Struggle for a Community
programme.desc: The Jane-Finch "Corridor" is an area of six square blocks in Toronto's North York. The film provides a powerful view of a community that, contrary to its popular image, is working towards a more positive future. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Honour to Senator Murray Sinclair
programme.desc: Alanis Obomsawin shares the powerful speech the Senator gave when he accepted the WFM-Canada World Peace Award, interspersing the heartbreaking testimonies of former students imprisoned at residential schools. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: I Am Skylar
programme.desc: Surrounded by a family and a community who show her unconditional love as she follows her personal path, Skylar faces the complexities of being a transgender girl on the cusp of puberty with refreshing honesty and unshakeable dignity. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: I Like Girls
programme.desc: In her trademark playful style, Quebec cartoonist and animator Diane Obomsawin, a.k.a. Obom, adapts her latest graphic novel for the screen, using endearing anthropomorphic figures to tell poignant real-life stories of love. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Ice Breakers
programme.desc: Josh Crooks is a promising teen hockey star in a sport where Black players like him are chronically underrepresented. Ice Breakers reveals the buried history of a pioneering Black hockey league in Atlantic Canada. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Impossible Figures and other stories I
programme.desc: An ominous ticking sound triggers an explosion. Wandering deserted city streets, an elegant elderly woman recalls what was and what could have been. This films is a mysterious and haunting portrait of personal and societal self-destruction. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Indigenous Plant Diva
programme.desc: Cease Wyss was given the name 'T'Uy'Tanat', meaning "Woman who travels by canoe to gather medicines for all people." Wyss reveals the remarkable healing powers of plants growing among the sprawling urban streets of downtown Vancouver. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Interview
programme.desc: A freewheeling cinematic experience, this film is the work of two filmmakers who relate their perceptions of each other through their respective animation techniques. Images and words are paired in startling associations. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.title: Island Green
programme.desc: Island Green dares to ask: What if PEI went entirely organic? Using beautiful imagery and poignant stories from the island’s small but growing community of organic farmers, Millefiore Clarkes explores a healthier future for Canada’s smallest province. (Documentary, Movie)

programme.desc: From roughly 1955 to 1965, an organized movement fueled by Black Americans grew across the American south. The goal: an end to segregation and a guarantee of equal civil rights. And nowhere did the movement for Black equality fight its most crucial battles than in one of the most segregated states in the union: Alabama. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.desc: A comprehensive picture of the African American experience during the Revolutionary War. Featuring the story of the war within the revolution through the eyes of some of the most crucial and significant African American figures of the country's foundation, including Crispus Attucks, Peter Salem, Phillis Wheatley and James Armistead Lafayette. Spotlighting NBA legend, best-selling author and esteemed activist Kareem Abdul-Jabbar. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Black Patriots: Heroes of the Civil War
programme.desc: This one-hour documentary takes viewers through an evolution of African American involvement over the course of the Civil War through the stories of some of the most crucial and significant figures of the day including Harriet Tubman, Robert Smalls, Frederick Douglass, the 1st Kansas Colored Volunteer Infantry Regiment, and the most celebrated regiment of black soldiers during the Civil War, the famed 54th Massachusetts Infantry Regiment. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Black Patriots: Buffalo Soldiers
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Nations' first all-Black peacetime regiments who fought to expand America's presence in the West, protect the National Parks, and defend the U.S. on foreign soil. Narrated by Blair Underwood, this special brings to light the remarkable story of this unknown army of African American soldiers whose stories have been ignored by history. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Harlem Hellfighters

programme.title: Triumph: Jesse Owens and the Berlin Olympics
programme.desc: This documentary explores the dramatic tale of Owens' athletic dedication, perseverance and triumph over Hitler's Aryan supremacy agenda. (New). (Documentary)

programme.title: 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.desc: The powerful story of the first all-Black tank unit to serve in combat in U.S. military history. Under General George Patten's command, the 761st battalion fought heroically throughout WWII and were the furthest east of all U.S. troops in the European theater of war when hostilities ceased in 1945. Their valor went unrecognized for decades until veterans of the battalion and their allies saw to it that they received the honor and recognition they deserved. (Repeat). (Documentary)

The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S9E1 - Kardea Brown serves her local college football team a winning lineup of chopped cheese sandwiches, colossal onion rings, hot Carolina chicken fingers, and apple pie hand pies with apple cider glaze. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S8E2 - Kardea Brown cooks up light, classic Southern dishes; veggie soup bunch inspired by Grandma; flaky pecan and panko-crusted baked fish with mashed parsnips; blackberry lavender cornmeal cake. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S20E4 - Ree makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce and uses them for her triple pepperoni pizza and her signature pie, Pizza Ree-a; a mashup of Caesar salad and Not Knots; the Naughty Cowgirl cocktail. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S20E13 - Ree Drummond makes almost-healthy and fabulous versions of classics. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S21E9 - Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals: buffalo chicken burgers, Tex-Mex pulled chicken, a snappy 16 Min-estrone soup, and balsamic chicken. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E12 - A trip down memory lane with updated comfort food favorites; Ree brings back soothing retro noodle soup, an amazing air fryer grilled cheese, beloved spaghetti and cheese, nostalgic pizza stuffed peppers and a classic chocolate malt. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E2 - Ree Drummond stocks the freezer with some all-time favorites, including her easy pineapple pork shoulder and a hearty slow simmered beef ragu; she prepares heat-and-go sweet and savory breakfast wraps and decadent shortcut brownie ice cream bites. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games

programme.desc: S31E2 - Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro of "The Kitchen" aim to take down Bobby Flay; chefs Kathy Fang and Natascha Hess get into a pickle with the star ingredient. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.desc: S28E15 - Chefs and business partners Scott Calhoun and David Feola must challenge each other before they take Bobby Flay down; Anne Burrell and Michael Symon give Bobby the business. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.desc: S18E9 - The kitchen comes alive when Katie Lee and Valerie Bertinelli team up to see Bobby Flay fall; it's up to them to make the call when chef Chris Henry from Massachusetts battles Buffalo, N.Y., chef Steve Gedra for a chance at the champ. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: S25E6 - Getting lyrical in the kitchen when Food Network's Damaris Phillips gets TV host Jaymee Sire to join her sing-along that doesn't end; French chef Remi Granger and Philadelphia native Elijah Milligan both hope to strike a victorious chord. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Carnival Eats

programme.title: Carnival Eats

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: S5E5 - A smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce; a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa; octopus-pork and salmon sausages. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Channing Tatum
programme.desc: Channing Tatum hikes, explores and climbs during his expedition to Yosemite National Park. The pair begin with a helicopter ride, move through dense forest, then eat some dangerous food.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lindsey Vonn
programme.desc: Bear and Olympic gold medallist Lindsey Vonn take a speedboat trip, then swim to shore and make their way along a rugged coastline; after traversing a deep chasm, they collect a dinner of sea urchins.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water. (Action, Series, Adventure)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Derek Hough
programme.desc: Dancer Derek Hough joins Bear on an adventure across the mountains of Bulgaria; Derek reveals childhood struggles and teaches Bear some dance moves. (Action, Series, Adventure)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Jesse Tyler Ferguson
programme.desc: Actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson joins Bear on a 6,000-foot descent along the cliffs and ridges of Croda dei Toni; Ferguson shares insight about his sudden rise to fame. (Action, Series, Adventure)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith. (Action, Series, Adventure)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Vanessa Hudgens
programme.desc: Bear and Vanessa Hudgens rappel from a helicopter into the high Sierra for a scenic adventure; Bear and Vanessa evade a boulder avalanche, summit a massive dormant volcano, and encounter a rattlesnake; Vanessa talks about her rise to stardom. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Actress Michelle Rodriguez and Bear go to a desert Nevada; unexpected high winds during a sky-diving trip send Michelle off course; Michelle and Bear must come up with clever ways to stay hydrated. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tom Arnold
programme.desc: Tom Arnold heads into the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon. They take a helicopter to an isolated forest, hike through woodland, catch a trout and cross a river with the help of a log. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Keri Russell
programme.desc: Keri Russell and Bear journey through the Canary Islands; they dine on undigested seeds from a pigeon carcass, use a grappling hook and make a daring escape from a mountain peak using a paraglider; Keri discusses her family and path to fame. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts
programme.desc: Movie star Julia Roberts joins Bear on a lifesaving Red Nose Day adventure in Kenya. They're on a two-day trek enduring blistering savannah temperatures. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan joins Grylls in Wales where they start their journey by dropping into rough waters off the coast before making their way up the coast and to the top of the mountains for their exit. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner. (Adventure, Series, Action)

programme.title: A Second Chance at Love
programme.desc: Alicia and Arnold's marriage is amiss. Rather than face the problem, Alicia immerses herself in her divorced parents' affairs by setting them up on a dating app.

programme.title: Yellowstone Romance
programme.desc: When Olivia’s BFF gets engaged and says she’s moving to a ranch in Wyoming, Olivia makes a last ditch effort to show Amber what a mistake the move is and arranges a bachelorette getaway to a working dude ranch.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Inspiration
programme.desc: Emma's life plan is thrown off course when Paolo must return to Italy to take care of his father and she discovers a new passion for making art accessible to all.

programme.title: A Gift of Miracles
programme.desc: A chance encounter between two strangers, through a series of small coincidences, gives one young woman a new perspective on life, love and the world's unexplained marvels.

programme.title: Love’s Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose, a passionate fashion stylist in her 30's living in New York, inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love in Glacier National: A National Park Romance
programme.desc: An avalanche forecasting expert brings her new technology to Glacier National Park where she faces push-back from the Director of Mountain Rescue who's trained in intuition and common sense.

programme.title: Lead With Your Heart
programme.desc: After forgetting his wedding anniversary, Ben Walker scrambles to make a dinner reservation and buy a gift for his wife, Maura. When Ben calls Maura to tell her about the reservation she realizes that she forgot. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: The Dog Lover's Guide to Dating
programme.desc: Simon believes Chloe is the girl of his dreams but can't seem to win over her beloved pup. He enlists dog trainer, Alex, and soon finds himself wondering where his real connection might be. (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Love Stories in Sunflower Valley
programme.desc: Kate Francis has been a loyal assistant at a Seattle newspaper for the past five years. When one of her story ideas finally gets accepted, the assignment takes her back to her charming hometown of Sunflower Valley. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: A corporate executive is sent to a small town to re-brand a restaurant as part of a strategic acquisition, but the iconic diner happens to be in her home town where she hasn't been in years. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Dearly Depotted
programme.desc: Abby Knight, ex-lawyer, crime buff and owner of Bloomers Flower Shop, is having a week to be reckoned with. A reluctant bridesmaid at wedding, Abby ends up not just doing the flowers, but having to solve a murder. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Abby Knight, a former lawyer turned proud flower shop owner, is starting over after the death of her husband with the support from her father, a new business and her daughter off to college. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Speaking Your Language
programme.desc: Julie specialises in ancient languages. She dreams of becoming a translator at the Museum of Natural History, but refuses a job as a nanny for the dog of museum curator Dan. Instead, she starts teaching him French. (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Love in Whitbrooke
programme.desc: A project manager is offered the opportunity of a lifetime in London. But when she returns to her hometown and meets the perfect guy, her passion and talent for painting is rekindled. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Royal Nanny
programme.desc: MI5 agent Claire goes undercover as the royal nanny, and must overcome the challenges of her assignment, like resisting the charms of Prince Colin while keeping the family safe at Christmas. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Marry Me in Yosemite
programme.desc: Zoe, a notable photojournalist, visits Yosemite landscapes made famous by Ansel Adams. When she meets Jack, an intriguing tour guide, he opens her eyes to new adventures as they embark on a journey. (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove, her father, and Detective Carter investigate murder, theft, blackmail and fraud at the museum. (Thriller, Movie)

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: Erin Cavendish goes undercover at her family's chocolate plant to see why sales are down when she meets head chocolatier, Bryan, who has new ideas on how to update the Easter product line. (Comedy, Movie, Late Night Comedies)

programme.title: Five Star Christmas
programme.desc: When a travel writer shows up unexpectedly at their dad's B&B, the Ralston family all pretend to be guests in hopes of a good review. Lucy falls for guest Jake but can't share her secret.

programme.title: The Christmas Pact
programme.desc: Hailee, a well-known entertainment reporter for a network morning show, is humiliated when her oft-absent investment banker fiancé, Jason is revealed to be linked to a Beverly Hills socialite.

programme.title: Marrying Father Christmas
programme.desc: When Miranda Chester set off to find information on her biological father two Christmases ago, she never imagined that her investigation would lead her to the family she had always longed for and the love of her life.

programme.title: Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Ever-optimistic single mom Emma Sanderson is looking for a Christmas miracle to write about for the lifestyle magazine at which she has landed a temporary job. While following her lead on the story...

programme.title: A Homecoming for the Holidays
programme.desc: Country singer Charlotte is home for the holidays and brother Ryan's fellow ex-soldier Matt is in town. Writing her new album, Charlotte works with Matt to build a house for a friend in town.

programme.title: Cranberry Christmas
programme.desc: A separated couple feign marital bliss on national television to help their town's Christmas festival - and their business. But what will be when rekindled love is complicated by new opportunities?

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's A Mrs. Miracle Christmas
programme.desc: When a family faces loneliness and loss of faith, Mrs. Miracle swoops in to renew their Christmas Spirit, and they experience a holiday of heavenly proportions. (Movie, Drama, Inspirational Drama)

programme.title: A Christmas Carousel
programme.desc: When Lila is hired by the Royal Family of Ancadia to restore their carousel as a surprise present for the prince’s niece, she works with him side-by-side to complete it by Christmas. (Movie, Drama, Romance)

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. (Inspirational Drama, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: A Family Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Claudia has it all, or so she thinks... She's smart, successful, driven and single. Until one magical Thanksgiving Claudia is transported to the life of what could be if she just took a moment to give up her career and find love. (Comedy, Movie, Late Night Comedies)

programme.title: Hearts of Christmas
programme.desc: To the devoted caregivers of the Community Memorial Hospital NICU, every 'premie' heartbeat is a precious gift, and every family whose baby they care for is like their own. (Inspirational Drama, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: The Rooftop Christmas Tree
programme.desc: It's Christmas and once again, Dale places a tree on his roof and ends up in court. No one in the small town knows why he continues the practice, but an idealistic attorney, is determined to keep him out of jail. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Well Suited for Christmas
programme.desc: Rachel Rocca is a fashion designer who must dress the city's most eligible bachelor Brett Stone, for a Christmas charity gala. As she works on it, she finds out the actual reason behind his charity... (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: We Need a Little Christmas
programme.desc: Julie is juggling being a single mother to a grieving child and facing her first Christmas without her husband when she develops an unexpected friendship with a neighbor. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Ice Sculpture Christmas
programme.desc: A premiere ice sculpting contest at an exclusive country club is the backdrop for this Christmas love story between Callie, a plucky kitchen staff member intent on finishing culinary school, and David. (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Family For Christmas
programme.desc: Claudia has it all, or so she thinks... She's smart, successful, driven and single. Until one magical Thanksgiving Claudia is transported to the life of what could be if she just took a moment to give up her career. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Engaging Father Christmas CA
programme.desc: It’s Christmas and Miranda leaves Seattle with a suitcase full of presents to join her long- lost family in Carlton Heath, where she will experience the joyful traditions she missed as a child. (Romance, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: When I Think of Christmas
programme.desc: Sara comes home for Christmas to help her mom move, reconnects with a past love, and makes a surprising discovery for a holiday they will all remember. (Romance, Movie, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: A hit man (Jason Statham) awakes to the news that he has been poisoned and will die in an hour unless he keeps adrenaline coursing through his body.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: Powered by an artificial heart, Chev Chelios (Jason Statham) embarks on a frantic chase through Los Angeles to find the thief who stole his own, nearly indestructible, one.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Punisher (Ray Stevenson) leaves him horribly disfigured, mob boss Billy Russoti (Dominic West) changes his name to Jigsaw and sets out for revenge.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff (Arnold Schwarzenegger) must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: With help from colleague Dane Wellsand activist Steven Goldstein, terminally ill New Jersey detective Laurel Hester fights for pension benefits for her domestic partner Stacie Andree.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: An unexpected romance blooms between a struggling mechanic (Idris Elba) and the attorney (Gabrielle Union) who is representing him in a custody battle for his young daughters. (Series, Entertainment)

programme.title: A Better Life
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant struggles to give his teenage son a better life by working as a gardener in Los Angeles. He soon does whatever it takes to move out of the city and get his boy away from dangerous gangs. (Entertainment, Series)

programme.title: Salmon Fishing in the Yemen
programme.desc: A scientist (Ewan McGregor) and a businesswoman (Emily Blunt) fall in love while devising a way to bring sport fishing to the Middle East. (Entertainment, Series)

programme.title: The Impossible
programme.desc: A couple (Naomi Watts, Ewan McGregor) and their three sons encounter terror, courage and compassion following the December 2004 tsunami that devastated Thailand. (Entertainment, Series)

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects. (Entertainment, Series)

programme.title: The Last Full Measure
programme.desc: Airman William H. Pitsenbarger Jr. is awarded the Medal of Honor for his service and actions on the battlefield. (Entertainment, Series)

programme.title: Semper Fi

programme.title: The Magic Of Belle Isle
programme.desc: In an effort to tap into his original talent, a wheelchair-bound author moves to a rural town, where he befriends a single mother and her three kids, who help reignite his passion for writing.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: A romantic comedy where a bored, overworked Estate Lawyer, upon first sight of a beautiful instructor, signs up for ballroom dancing lessons.

programme.title: The Girl Who Invented Kissing
programme.desc: THE GIRL WHO INVENTED KISSING is the story of a nameless, drifter girl who steps off a bus and into a bar owned by two middle-aged brothers.

programme.title: In Bloom
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating journey through 5 compelling short films that delve into the complexities of gender issues following characters on the brink of a life defining moment, whether a first or a last, by choice or circumstance.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Romeo and Juliet secretly wed despite the sworn contempt their families hold for each other. It is not long, however, before a chain of fateful events changes the lives of both families forever.

programme.title: Sleeping Giant
programme.desc: While spending the summer in cottage country on the shores of Lake Superior, three teens cope with boredom by testing the limits of their experience.

programme.title: Welcome to Me
programme.desc: When Alice Klieg wins the Mega-Millions lottery, she immediately quits her psychiatric meds and buys her own talk show. (Movie, Comedy, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a social security check accidentally made out for $5,000,000 instead of the expected $50,000. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime. (Movie, Dramedy, Drama)

programme.title: A Tale of Love and Darkness
programme.desc: The story of Amos Oz's youth, set against the backdrop of the end of the British Mandate for Palestine and the early years of the State of Israel. (Movie, Historical Drama, Drama)

programme.title: Ain't Them Bodies Saints
programme.desc: A man (Casey Affleck) takes the fall for his lover's (Rooney Mara) crime, then four years later breaks out of prison to find her and their young daughter, who was born during his incarceration (Movie, Independent Drama, Drama)

programme.title: Paterson
programme.desc: Jim Jarmusch's critically acclaimed film focuses on a working-class poet (Adam Driver) in a small New Jersey town who practices his craft amidst the quiet magic of everyday life. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: An aging woman questions her life after suspecting her husband is having an affair. (Inspirational Drama, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil arrive in Oklahoma, where the problems arise. The Spanish pastor of his church struggles to hold on to his faith, and Neil finds himself with a woman from his childhood. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: An aging woman questions her life after suspecting her husband is having an affair. (Inspirational Drama, Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: Single dad and record store owner Frank is preparing to send his daughter Sam off to college. Hoping to stay connected through their shared musical passions, Frank urges Sam to turn their weekly "jam sesh" into a father-daughter live act. (Movie, Drama)

programme.title: Angelique's Isle
